category_sources: Official bvi homepage describes it as a display-oriented editor for binary files based on vi.
source_facts.description says bvi is a vi-like binary file hex editor.
display_name_sources: Official bvi homepage uses bvi and expands it as Binary VIsual editor.
docs_sources: Official bvi site provides the quick tutorial, command overview, and man page.
repo_sources: Official bvi homepage and SourceForge project provide source archives, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official bvi documentation describes binary editing, vi-style commands, and terminal use.
source_facts.description identifies a vi-like binary hex editor.
